productDisplayName: Rockport Men's Bindu India Medium Brown Shoe
description: Slip into the laid-back comfort of this Bindu lace-up oxfords. Coming from rockport's Signature Series, this shoe features a no-nonsense upper crafted from rich leather with contrast stitches goring for an easy Fit. Engineered with adidas AdiPRENE technology, this shoe offers all-day cushioning comfort.Upper Full-grain leather upper for added strength and durability Contrast stitching for further structure and maximum style Padded tongue and collar to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blistering Elongated lace vamp for a snug, customised fit Midsole PU footbed for moulded comfort and durability Shock absorbant cushioning to reduce foot fatigue Strobel technology on the heel to provide cushioned comfort for the feet, and to enhance support and flexibility when walking adiPRENE technology for cushioned comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Flex grooves provide flexibility in the movement of the feet Textures on the outsole increases grip on any kind of surfaces Shoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
